pi_items.source: Task description instructs creating 'Priority-Queue' and verifier.py logic explicitly checks if folder name contains 'priority' and 'queue'.
Task description and verifier.py logic check for email addressed to 'standup@devops-team.org'.
Task description requires at least 5 actionable emails moved, enforced by verifier.py 'pq_count >= min_moved'.
Task description requires at least 3 emails flagged, enforced by verifier.py 'flagged_count >= min_flagged'.
Task description asks for 'Morning Digest' subject. verifier.py loops over these keywords to find a match in the subject line.

Inspected the 50 emails from the SpamAssassin corpus in /workspace/assets/emails/ham/ and verified through grep that these exact mailing lists (SAdev, ILUG, zzzzteana, SAtalk, exmh-workers, IRR) are present in the headers and bodies of the emails.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses 50 real emails from the SpamAssassin corpus containing real mailing lists like SAdev, ILUG, and zzzzteana. It is verified that the verifier correctly checks for the existence of a custom folder named 'Priority-Queue' with at least 5 emails moved into it, at least 3 emails flagged, and a digest email composed to 'standup@devops-team.org' containing the expected keywords and references to at least 2 of the specific mailing lists.
